name: BRAIN ATROPHY
definition: irreversible loss of brain substance + subsequent enlargement of intra- and extracerebral
distribution: ipsilateral dilatation of basal cisterns + ventricles
discriminating_features: ipsilateral dilatation of basal cisterns + ventricles

general: ipsilateral dilatation of basal cisterns + ventricles
focal areas of periventricular high signal intensity
increased iron deposition in putamen approaching the concentration in globus pallidus
